examples: I made a solemn promise that I would return.
Erica was solemn, pulling at her blonde curls.
The solemn intensity of Jade's gaze discomfited him.
In person, in his office, Simmons slipped into solemn demeanor while addressing his opinion on Park51.
Mr Obama, meanwhile, said America's commitment to the security of Israel was "a solemn obligation".
